children.text: Sign in to compare usage and quickly pay your bill.
You can also pay without signing in. Just verify the account and provide us with a payment method.

content-desc: Button to reset map to my location

children.text:
Gas leaks are dangerous.

Leave the area at once.

Go to a location where you no longer smell gas.

DO NOT try to locate the source of the leak.

DO NOT re-enter the area until DTE Energy tells you it's safe to do so.

DO NOT use open flames, light matches, or smoke.

Treat all down wires as live and dangerous.

Stay at least 20 feet away.

Stay away from fences, puddles, or anything else a down wire is touching.

Keep children and pets away.

If a down wire falls on your car, stay inside and wait for help.

Never cross the yellow tape barrier surrounding a down wire.
Sign in to view your profile and manage payment methods!
